# MCP Time Server Error Handling Tests
# Tests various error conditions and invalid inputs

# Build the time server binary
go build -o mcp-time-server .

# Test invalid timezone for get_current_time
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Invalid/Timezone"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current time'
stdout 'invalid timezone'

# Test missing timezone parameter for get_current_time
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'timezone is required'

# Test empty timezone parameter for get_current_time
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":""}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'timezone is required'

# Test invalid source timezone for convert_time
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"Invalid/Source","time":"12:00","target_timezone":"UTC"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error converting time'
stdout 'invalid source timezone'

# Test invalid target timezone for convert_time
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"12:00","target_timezone":"Invalid/Target"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error converting time'
stdout 'invalid target timezone'

# Test invalid time format for convert_time
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"invalid","target_timezone":"America/New_York"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error converting time'
stdout 'invalid time format'

# Test missing time parameter for convert_time
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","target_timezone":"America/New_York"}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'time is required'

# Test invalid hour in time format
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"25:00","target_timezone":"America/New_York"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error converting time'
stdout 'invalid hour'

# Test invalid minute in time format
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"12:60","target_timezone":"America/New_York"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error converting time'
stdout 'invalid minute'

# Test negative hour
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"-1:00","target_timezone":"America/New_York"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error converting time'
stdout 'invalid hour'

# Test non-numeric hour
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"ab:00","target_timezone":"America/New_York"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error converting time'
stdout 'invalid hour'

# Test malformed JSON parameters
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":"invalid"},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'invalid parameters'
